title: Expansion of Border
description: The border expands as the player gains experience levels. This will make you feel lonely.
body:
## Description
The border expands as the player gains experience levels. This will make you feel lonely.

![preview](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/CY0AmHVw/images/74d8a2f7231a26d62293674662e258829d4b2a4b.jpeg)

## Dependencies
- Fabric loader requires [Fabric API](https://modrinth.com/mod/fabric-api)
